design_philosophy.core_loop: Select club and power, aim shot accounting for wind conditions, execute swing, progress through 18-hole courses and tournaments against AI competitors
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing precision aiming with variable environmental conditions (wind) and reading green contours for putting accuracy
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Authentic PGA professional golf experience with realistic ball physics, multiple real courses, and tournament competition
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Prioritizes simulation fidelity and realism over accessibility; emphasizes learning real golf mechanics (wind reading, green contours, club selection) rather than arcade simplification

difficulty.checkpointing: Per-hole progression within tournament rounds; players can replay shots and view replays of good shots
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Tournament mode against 60 AI competitors with displayed statistics allows players to gauge performance and adjust strategy

progression.unlock_mechanism: Multiple courses available from start (3 real PGA courses + 1 fictional Sterling Shores); multiple game modes (Tournament, Driving, Putting, Practice)
replayability_hooks: Tournament mode against 60 unseen AI competitors
Multiple courses with distinct layouts and difficulty
Multiplayer modes on select platforms (Amiga, Master System)

world_building_techniques: Real PGA courses (PGA West, TPC Avenel, TPC Sawgrass) provide authentic golf world context
PGA golfer advisor characters provide immersion
Fictional Sterling Shores course expands course variety

environmental_storytelling: Real golf course layouts and authentic PGA venues ground the game in sports reality
Three-dimensional hole previews and contoured green grids teach players to read terrain
Wind condition variability creates dynamic course challenges
Scoreboard tracking 60 AI competitors provides competitive context

sources_used: wikipedia: PGA Tour Golf - gameplay mechanics, courses, game modes, development history, critical reception
